name.ja: <ruby>精霊世妃<rt>エレメンタルサーガ</rt></ruby> ドリアード

text.en: Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to the activation of this card's effects. If you have 3 or more different Attributes in your GY and this card is in your hand: You can target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon both it and this card. If you have 3 or more different Attributes in your GY: You can Special Summon 1 monster from your Deck with a different Attribute from the monsters in your field and GY. You can only use each effect of "Elemental Saga Doriado" once per turn.
